subject: Cabira (Dragon Ball Super) — alien humanoid soldier in combat-ready stance
description: A humanoid figure with distinctly alien features — a large, round pale head with prominent ears or cranial protrusions and a wide-set jaw — stands in a compact, ready stance. The figure wears green-toned battle armor and appears composed and awaiting orders. The expression is neutral-to-attentive. The background features warm golden-orange tones with soft energy coloration. The art is rendered in a flat anime style.
foreground: Alien humanoid with large round head, green armor, standing at attention in combat-ready posture
background: Warm golden-orange gradient with soft energy glow
